zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Webb於1545年出生在英國維爾爾德雷可特 福利亞特時，他的父親John Webb36歲，母親Thomasine Giles32歲。他於1565年與Margaret結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1604年在英國英格蘭維爾爾德雷可特 福利亞特享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 巴多福。

nameMeanings.name: Webb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

variants.name: Webster
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webbester ‘weaver’ (Old English webbestre ‘female weaver’). By the time of surname formation, the gender distinction of the -stre suffix had almost completely disappeared. Compare Webb , Webber , and Weaver .

History: The name Webster was brought to North America from England independently by several different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One John Webster settled in Ipswich, MA, in 1635; another John Webster (died 1661), ancestor of the lexicographer Noah Webster, emigrated to Cambridge, MA, c. 1631 and later became one of the founders of the colony of CT, of which he was appointed governor in 1656. Daniel Webster (1782–1852), politician and orator, was born in Salisbury, NH, a descendant of Thomas Webster, a prominent 17th-century citizen of Ipswich, MA, whose family had settled there around 1635, while he was still a child.

variants.name: Webber
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Webb was born in 1545, in Draycot Foliat, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Webb, was 36 and his mother, Thomasine Giles, was 32. He married Margaret in 1565. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1604, in Draycot Foliat, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Great Baddow, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Webbが1545年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアドレイコト フォリアトで生まれた時，父John Webbは36歳，母Thomasine Gilesは32歳であった。1565年にMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1604年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアドレイコト フォリアトで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト バッドオウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Webb(이)가 1545년 영국 윌츠히르 드라이컷 폴리앳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Webb(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine Giles(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1565년 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1604년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 드라이컷 폴리앳에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 바도에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Webb родился в 1545 г. в местности дреикот фолят, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Webb было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Giles, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret в 1565 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1604 г. в местности дреикот фолят, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности грит баддоу, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
